Jongeun Park
Research CV Teaching Resources

A Room Forever (2015)

Through their subtle application of leftfield approaches, they reveal the strain of Weird America running through the project. - Wire Magazine (Stewart Smith)

Available on Bandcamp, Spotify, iTunes, Amazon

Tracklist

  1. A Room Forever 03:34
  2. In The Dry 05:25
  3. The Salvation of Me 04:39
  4. The Way It Has To Be 05:53
  5. Trilobites 04:48
  6. The First Day of Winter 05:19
  7. The Honored Dead 05:44
  8. Fox Hunters 04:08
  9. The Scrapper 06:11
  10. Hollow 06:01
  11. Time And Again 03:39
  12. The Mark 04:38

Production

  • Released in December 2015
  • Performers
    • Aaron Irwin (clarinet)
    • Matthew McDonald (trombone)
    • Pete McCann (guitar)
    • Thomson Kneeland (bass)
